requests.name: Express Interest

body.note: Interested in the fall semester. We are two junior students.

requests.notes: Students only. All fields optional. Note max 280 chars. Occupants 1-6.

requests.name: Withdraw Interest
requests.notes: Students only. Removes expression of interest.

requests.name: Get Interest Count
requests.notes: Public. Returns count + userHasExpressed (if auth header present).

requests.name: Get Interested Students (Landlord)
requests.notes: Landlord only (must own listing). Returns student details.

requests.name: My Interests (Student)
requests.notes: Students only. Returns all listings where student expressed interest.
